title: LION SHIPBROKERS- FENG SHUI ANALYSIS
summary:
"The man who chases two rabbits, catches neither."
Ancient Chinese proverb. Chinese New Year, also known as Lunar New Year or Spring Festival, is just around the corner; January 22nd, 2023 marks the beginning of the Chinese Year of the Rabbit and celebrations will wrap up with the Lantern Festival on February 5th, 2023. More than 2 billion of the world's 8 billion population will celebrate Lunar New Year in 2023.
